subject: Live in ~3hrs
body:
Save this link: live.acq.com

Set an alarm. Festivities begin - at 9am PT / 12pm ET.

I'm going to be revealing a project I've been working on in secret for years. It's finally ready. I can't wait to show it to you.

Alex

PS - Last chance to get VIP for free by preordering a single book. If you plan on getting a book, there's zero logical reason to not get more free stuff for the same price (and get them faster).

PPS - If you prefer to add the launch event to your calendar (automatically in your timezone), here you go:

- Tap to Add to Google Calendar,

- Or use the iOS / Android Calendar File,
